description: Intent-only request: classify a long linear order-fulfillment pipeline as workflow-anchored despite its step count.

conversation.text: When a new order arrives: validate address, check inventory, charge the card, generate invoice PDF, email the customer, add to CRM, notify fulfillment.

processExpectations: The agent explains that despite having seven sequential steps, the request contains no branching or runtime reasoning, and that the number of steps alone does not imply agentic autonomy.
The agent does not classify the request as agent-anchored merely because it has many sequential steps.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
